item.text: I’m fixing the two `sqlx::Error` conversion points in the new work-packet query path first, then I’ll rerun the user’s short-target compile command to see whether any further product compile errors remain.

I found the two exact `await?` sites in `load_tracked_work_packet_from_sqlite(...)`. I’m patching them to map `sqlx::Error` through `StorageError`, which is the correct error boundary for this workflow layer.

I’ve applied the boundary fix in `workflows.rs`. Next I’m running `rustfmt` on that file and then the short-target `cargo test --no-run` command the validator used so we can see the next real compiler result.

item.text: The compile fix is in, but the first direct runtime test exposed a real product defect: emitted work-packet `packet.json` is failing structured validation because `mirror_state` is missing. I’m tracing that field through the tracked work-packet model and the new emission path now.

    pub lora_id: Option<String>,

}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize, PartialEq)]
pub struct TrackedMicroTask {
    #[serde(default = "default_micro_task_schema_id")]
    pub schema_id: String,
    #[serde(default = "default_micro_task_schema_version")]
    pub schema_version: String,
    #[serde(default)]
    pub record_id: String,
    #[serde(default = "default_micro_task_record_kind")]
    pub record_kind: String,
    #[serde(default)]
    pub project_profile_kind: ProjectProfileKind,
    #[serde(default = "default_structured_updated_at")]
    pub updated_at: Iso8601Timestamp,
    #[serde(default)]
    pub mirror_state: MirrorSyncState,
    #[serde(default)]
    pub authority_refs: Vec<String>,
    #[serde(default)]
    pub evidence_refs: Vec<String>,
    #[serde(default)]
    pub summary_record_path: Option<String>,
    #[serde(default)]
    pub profile_extension: Option<Value>,
    pub mt_id: String,
    pub wp_id: String,
    pub name: String,
    pub scope: String,
    pub files: MicroTaskFiles,
    #[serde(default)]
    pub done_criteria: Vec<String>,

    pub active_session_ids: Vec<String>,

    pub iterations: Vec<MicroTaskIterationRecord>,
    pub current_iteration: u32,
    pub max_iterations: u32,

}

}

#[serde(rename_all = "snake_case")]
pub enum StructuredCollaborationValidationCode {

    SchemaVersionMismatch,
    MissingField,
    InvalidFieldType,
    InvalidFieldValue,
    IncompatibleProfileExtension,
    SummaryJoinMismatch,
    AuthorityScopeMismatch,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize, PartialEq, Eq)]
pub struct StructuredCollaborationValidationIssue {
    pub code: StructuredCollaborationValidationCode,
    pub field: String,
    #[serde(default)]
    pub expected: Option<String>,
    #[serde(default)]
    pub actual: Option<String>,
    pub message: String,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize, PartialEq, Eq)]
pub struct StructuredCollaborationValidationResult {
    pub ok: bool,
    pub family: StructuredCollaborationRecordFamily,
    pub schema_id: String,
    pub schema_version: String,

item.text: The failing test narrowed it down: `StructuredCollaborationSummaryRecord` still doesn’t carry the base-envelope `mirror_state`, but the shared validator requires that field for all structured-collaboration families. I’m patching the summary record and its callers so emitted summaries validate under the same envelope rules as packets.

item.text: I’ve confirmed the missing field is in the shared summary envelope, not the packet struct itself. I’m fixing that in `locus/types.rs` and updating both summary emitters in `workflows.rs`, then I’ll rerun the failing direct tests.

item.text:
Fixed the two `sqlx::Error` boundary mistakes in [workflows.rs](/D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/src/workflows.rs#L3062) and [workflows.rs](/D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/src/workflows.rs#L3157) by mapping through `StorageError`, which `WorkflowError` already accepts. While rerunning direct tests, I found one real follow-on defect: structured summaries still lacked the base-envelope `mirror_state`, so work-packet summary validation failed even though packet emission was correct. I fixed that in [types.rs](/D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/src/locus/types.rs#L650) and [types.rs](/D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/src/locus/types.rs#L1115), and passed the field through both summary emitters in [workflows.rs](/D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/src/workflows.rs#L3338) and [workflows.rs](/D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/src/workflows.rs#L10234). No Loom-protected file was touched, and the earlier validator-driven changes stayed intact.

Verification with short target dir `D:\hsk_schema_tgt`:
- `rustfmt --edition 2021 src/backend/handshake_core/src/locus/types.rs src/backend/handshake_core/src/workflows.rs`
  Result: passed.
- `$env:CARGO_TARGET_DIR='D:\hsk_schema_tgt'; cargo test --manifest-path ..\wt-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1\src\backend\handshake_core\Cargo.toml --test micro_task_executor_tests --no-run`
  Result: passed.
- `$env:CARGO_TARGET_DIR='D:\hsk_schema_tgt'; cargo test --manifest-path ..\wt-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1\src\backend\handshake_core\Cargo.toml --test role_mailbox_tests --no-run`
  Result: passed.
- `$env:CARGO_TARGET_DIR='D:\hsk_schema_tgt'; cargo test --manifest-path ..\wt-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1\src\backend\handshake_core\Cargo.toml --test micro_task_executor_tests locus_bind_session_normalizes_and_deduplicates_session_ids -- --exact`
  Result: passed.
- `$env:CARGO_TARGET_DIR='D:\hsk_schema_tgt'; cargo test --manifest-path ..\wt-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1\src\backend\handshake_core\Cargo.toml --test micro_task_executor_tests locus_create_and_close_wp_emit_structured_work_packet_packet_and_summary -- --exact`
  Result: passed.
- `$env:CARGO_TARGET_DIR='D:\hsk_schema_tgt'; cargo test --manifest-path ..\wt-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1\src\backend\handshake_core\Cargo.toml --test micro_task_executor_tests locus_sync_task_board_emits_structured_index_and_view -- --exact`
  Result: passed.
- `$env:CARGO_TARGET_DIR='D:\hsk_schema_tgt'; cargo test --manifest-path ..\wt-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1\src\backend\handshake_core\Cargo.toml --test micro_task_executor_tests locus_sync_task_board_validation_reports_authority_scope_drift -- --exact`
  Result: passed.
- `$env:CARGO_TARGET_DIR='D:\hsk_schema_tgt'; cargo test --manifest-path ..\wt-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1\src\backend\handshake_core\Cargo.toml --test role_mailbox_tests role_mailbox_validation_reports_schema_and_authority_drift -- --exact`
  Result: passed.
- `git diff --check -- src/backend/handshake_core/src/locus/types.rs src/backend/handshake_core/src/workflows.rs`
  Result: passed; only Git CRLF normalization warnings.

This follow-up only changed [types.rs](/D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/src/locus/types.rs) and [workflows.rs](/D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/src/workflows.rs). No remaining compile blocker surfaced in the short-target packet test path.
